description: Additional Tier 1 (AT1 / CoCo) perpetual bond pricer. Prices fixed-to-reset perpetual subordinated bank capital instruments assuming call at first_call_date (market convention). Computes YTC, projected reset coupon, extension scenario (price to perpetuity), and bail-in distance-to-trigger metrics. Loss absorption can be write-down or equity conversion.

required_fields.name: first_call_date
required_fields.description: First optional call / reset date (DD-MM-YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD)

required_fields.name: fixed_coupon_rate
required_fields.description: Fixed coupon rate until first_call_date (decimal or %, auto-normalised)

required_fields.name: reset_spread
required_fields.description: Spread added to the reference swap rate at each reset (decimal or bp)

required_fields.name: reset_reference_tenor
required_fields.description: Tenor of the reference rate used at reset dates (e.g. '5Y', '10Y')

required_fields.name: cet1_trigger_pct
required_fields.description: CET1 ratio (%) below which bail-in fires (e.g. 5.125 or 7.0)

required_fields.name: loss_absorption
required_fields.description: Mechanism activated at the bail-in trigger

required_fields.name: accrual_day_count
required_fields.description: Day count convention for coupon accrual

required_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
required_fields.description: Z-spread over the discount curve in basis points (issuer credit and subordination premium)

optional_fields.name: cet1_current_pct
optional_fields.description: Current CET1 ratio (%) of the issuer — used to compute distance_to_trigger

optional_fields.name: conversion_price
optional_fields.description: For equity_conversion type: share price floor at which principal converts to equity (informational)

optional_fields.name: call_frequency_years
optional_fields.description: Interval in years between call / reset dates after first_call_date (informational)

optional_fields.name: price_convention
optional_fields.description: Which scenario to use as the primary NPV

optional_fields.name: perpetuity_horizon_years
optional_fields.description: Number of years to model in the extension (non-call) scenario

optional_fields.name: first_coupon_date
optional_fields.description: Override for bonds with a short or long first coupon period (DD-MM-YYYY)

optional_fields.name: currency
optional_fields.description: Settlement currency (e.g. EUR, USD) — used for discount curve selection

optional_fields.name: hw_a
optional_fields.description: Hull-White mean reversion speed (used if calibration is active)

optional_fields.name: hw_sigma
optional_fields.description: Hull-White short-rate volatility (used if calibration is active)
